title: Yellow Plastic Tape Measure, 5m - Durable, Handy Tool for DIY Home Projects, 1 Piece
features: VERSATILE MEASUREMENT TOOL: Our yellow tape measure is designed for both professional and DIY enthusiasts, featuring dual measurement systems with both imperial (feet/inches) and metric (centimeters/meters) scales.
DURABLE CONTRUCTION: Crafted from high-quality plastic and metal, this tape measure is built to withstand the rigors of any home project, ensuring longevity and reliability when you need it most.
EXTENDED REACH: Reach further with our 5m (16.4ft) tape, designed to extend easily and retract smoothly, making even distant measurements a breeze and ensuring no project is too big to tackle.
VERSATILE USE: This tape measure is the perfect tool for all your measuring needs. From small home renovations to large construction projects, it's suitable for any task.

CONVENIENT PORTABILITY: Equipped with a sturdy metal belt clip, this tape measure attaches easily to your belt or tool bag. Always have it within reach for quick measurements on the go, making it a practical addition to any toolkit.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality tape measure reaches 5m (16.4ft) in length and features a rubber grip for comfort and a metal belt clip. Safety Warning No warning applicable
